page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6r.4xlarge is an arm64-based general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores utilizing the Ampere Altra processor architecture running at 2.8 GHz, with a single thread per core. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the ecs.g6r.4xlarge demonstrates consistent mid-tier performance across several compute and memory metrics. Multi-core stress-ng tests yield a score of 28603.05, while single-core performance reaches 1790.29. Memory bandwidth is robust, with read-only small block cached speeds at 1136.7 GB/sec and uncached large block read speeds at 122.26 GB/sec. However, certain cryptographic and single-threaded tasks present performance tradeoffs. The Passmark CPU encryption test scores 2605.13, and single-threaded bzip3 decompression registers at 7.62 GB/sec, both falling into the lower performance tier.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated Ampere Altra ARM cores deliver high resource density and predictable performance without hyperthreading overhead. This makes the instance a viable option for multi-threaded workloads that benefit from physical core isolation. It is well-suited for general-purpose applications, static web serving, Redis in-memory databases, and moderate database operations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6r.4xlarge is an arm64-based general-purpose instance featuring 16 dedicated physical cores powered by an Ampere Altra processor running at 2.8 GHz. It is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core, and operates on the KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmark data indicates stable multi-threaded performance, with a multi-core stress-ng score of 28603.05 and a Redis SET throughput of 21.74 million operations per second. However, it exhibits lower performance in single-threaded bzip3 decompression and Passmark CPU encryption tests. This instance offers a balanced resource profile, making it suitable for static web serving, Redis caching, and general-purpose multi-threaded workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6r.4xlarge is an arm64 instance featuring 16 dedicated Ampere Altra cores, 64 GB RAM, and 5 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for general-purpose and multi-threaded workloads.

tagline: An arm64-powered instance with sixteen dedicated cores and balanced memory for predictable multi-threaded computing and web serving.

64.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Average multi-core performance with 28603.05 stress-ng score

Best suited for static web serving, Redis caching, and general-purpose workloads
